page_title: Double Postcard to the Dead (G.I card)
text:
Double Postcard to the Dead 死者への往復葉書 - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. This postcard allows you to send and receive messages from the dead.
__NOTOC__

Summary

Double Postcard to the Dead 死者への往復葉書 - This card grants the caster a book of 1000 return postage-paid postcards. It allows the user to write a message on it with it addressed to a deceased person, and you will receive a reply the next day. If the name is incorrectly spelt or the intended deceased person is not yet dead, then the postcard will not return when sent off.

|-
![Eng]
|No.031 - Double Postcard to the Dead 
If you leave a message and send a postcard to a dead person, a reply is written on the card the next day. 1000 pieces.
|}
